next_actions.recommended_next_action: No download is needed for rows that already have image_url; remaining image work must first find exact image_url/source evidence.

candidate_options.title: 2026 AKANE LIZE : OVT. 금속 뱃지 [2차 판매]

store_search_hints.manual_note: Hints are not evidence. Confirm the exact product/detail page before importing.

accepted_url_patterns: https://fanding.kr/@stellive/shop/{product_no}
page title/product card must preserve member, event, product type, and variant terms
required_evidence: product title preserves the catalog name or official variant wording
goods type/category matches the catalog row
product image or page context can later support image_url attachment
source_url_review_guidance.manual_confirmed_allowed_when: manual_value, evidence_url, and candidate_source_url all point to the same exact product detail page
do_not_use: low-score candidate with only generic token overlap
source_url_review_guidance.candidate_review_note: Candidate options are review hints only; do not copy the top candidate without exact title/member/event/type confirmation.

operator_checklist: Open primary_review_url first.
Confirm the exact product detail page, not a storefront/search page.
Use candidate_options only as hints when candidate_status is low-confidence or weak.
Paste the exact product detail URL into manual_value, evidence_url, and candidate_source_url.
Leave manual_confirmed=false until the source URL proves the exact item identity.
